title: lampranthus aureus
intro: Lampranthus aureus, also known as the Golden Carpet or Prostrate Ice Plant, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Lampranthus aureus include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
